'''shawulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okenone|okenone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okenone|okenone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shawulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shæwilith || shæwilij || shæwilish || shæwili
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || shawuwuluth || shawuwuluj || shawuwulush || shawuwulu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || shawuluth || shawuluj || shawulush || shawulu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || shawuflufth || shawuflufj || shawuflufsh || shawufluf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || shawuluthu || shawuluju || shawulushu || shawuluku
|-
| [[Patient]] || shawuluth || shawuluj || shawulush || shawulu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || shawuluthul || shawulujul || shawulushul || shawulukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || shawuluuthuthu || shawuluujuju || shawuluushushu || shawuluuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || shawuluthun || shawulujun || shawulushun || shawulukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || shawuluthuoro || shawulujuoro || shawulushuoro || shawulukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
